name: Apple Inc.
summary: Apple reported Q2 2026 earnings on April 28: revenue $94.8B (+5% YoY) beat consensus by 1.2%, EPS $1.65 vs $1.61 expected. Services revenue grew 14% YoY to $24.1B, while iPhone revenue was flat. Management raised the dividend by 4% and authorized an additional $90B buyback. Guidance for Q3 implied low-single-digit revenue growth, slightly below sell-side consensus. China iPhone shipments declined 8% YoY per Counterpoint data, partially offset by India growth.
key_themes: China demand remains the swing factor
